priorities.label: S93 P1 — NONET: 9-square Sudoku-lock event subsystem (Phase 1 — mechanic + retro board + realm-shift audio + vector spirits)
priorities.objective: Ship NONET Phase 1: connecting EXACTLY 9 pure-Square primitives into one structure freezes the duel for all players and summons a synced, seeded 6x6 Sudoku trial (digits = the six SparkType colours); first to solve gets score x2, all others /2, then the duel resumes (120s timeout = no-op resume, anti-softlock). Host-authoritative + deterministic: host mints one seed -> broadcasts -> every client mulberry32(seed) -> byte-identical puzzle; all x2//2 + detectNonet host-only -> zero desync.
priorities.scope: NEW: state/sudoku.ts (deterministic 6x6 gen+validator), state/sudokuEvent.ts (detectNonet/startSudoku/resolveSudoku), render/sudoku/ overlay. TOUCH: worldTypes.ts(+sudoku,+sudokuFiredThisMatch), world.ts(init), gameMode.ts(start/return clears), scoring.ts(freeze guard), main.ts(freeze gate+overlay watcher+trigger sweep), placePrimitive.ts(trigger hook), net/protocol.ts(NetSnapshot.sudoku + SUDOKU_SOLVED intent + PROTOCOL_VERSION bump), net/hostHandlers.ts + clientHandlers.ts, input/controls.ts, render/audioManager.ts(realm-shift). OFF-BUNDLE ASSETS: public/audio/nonet-theme.ogg (transcode of cloudstep-caravan.mp3), public/audio/nonet/*.ogg. OUT (Phase 2/sep PDR): illustrated public/art/nonet/ sprites; bot solving; per-cell live progress; difficulty scaling.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; vitest green (existing 1433 + new). NEW sudoku.test.ts (gen determinism same-seed byte-identical, valid complete solution, unique-solvable, isSolved accept/reject/incomplete). NEW sudokuEvent.test.ts (detectNonet fires exactly-9-pure-Square, rejects 8/10/9+Dot/second-time; resolveSudoku x2 winner //2 others + scoreProgress=max + clears). protocol roundtrip + PROTOCOL_VERSION bump. gameMode start/return clears the 2 fields. bundle <550 KiB. Post-build: Triumvirate CHECK + 2-browser E2E.
priorities.check_method: S93 P1 (31a8aa6, pushed -> deploy.yml builds spark-online.space): NONET 9-square Sudoku-lock event, ALL modes. SHIPPED: state/sudoku.ts (deterministic seeded 6x6 gen+validators, unique-solution); state/sudokuEvent.ts (detectNonet exactly-9-pure-Square + start/submit/resolve/tick, host-authoritative, x2//2 + detection HOST-ONLY -> zero desync); placePrimitive trigger (host, once/match) + main.ts freeze gate (whole sim pauses via early-continue, tick+tickSudoku keep running, snapshot-send replicated INSIDE the freeze so 1v1 clients don't stall); render/sudokuOverlay.ts retro arcade-Tetris board (6 spark-colour jewels, gold frame, scanlines, kami+kodama) LAZY code-split; netcode = NetSnapshot.sudoku additive-optional (seed-only, clients regen puzzle via mulberry32) + SUDOKU_SOLVED client intent (allowlist + bench policy 'allow' + stampSenderSeat) + PROTOCOL_VERSION 8->9 (HelloMsg literal-type tripwire caught+fixed); audio realm-shift (Cloudstep Caravan ogg, off-bundle, swapped onto music bus, all modes). GATES: tsc 0; vitest 1463/1463 (incl. 3 snapshot-roundtrip determinism tests + benchGate set-equality which caught the missing policy entry); npm run build OK. BUNDLE: main index 565.94 vite-kB = 552.7 KiB, +2.7 over the 550 charter (overlay split out to a 6.44kB lazy chunk; residual = generator+event core which the reducer/snapshot need synchronously, cannot lazy-load) -> CARRY-FORWARD (trim or charter review). VERIFY (preview, dev server): overlay renders correctly in 3 states (active trial, resolved 'SOLVED FIRST! x2', and the lazy-load path) with ZERO console errors; 6-colour jewels + selection + kami/kodama all draw; live keyboard input fills cells. CHECK = build + full vitest + 3-state preview screenshots (no Triumvirate Council this session -- user-path lean; user will playtest on spark-online.space + report bugs next session, per explicit direction). NOT DONE (carry): anime-SFX layer (need assets); combo order-symmetry bug the user flagged (Triangle->Spiral magic vs Spiral->Triangle placeholder line -- systemic, its own PDR); bundle trim; resolve-juice (shake/flood).

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #netcode-sync-a-host-event-by-mirroring-the-additive-optional-snapshot-pattern: to make a new host-authoritative event work in 1v1, (a) add an additive-optional field to WorldSnapshot (emit while active, omit -> client clears), (b) serialize ONLY the seed and REGENERATE derived state (the 6x6 puzzle) client-side from the shared mulberry32 RNG -- never send the grid, and (c) add ONE client INTENT for the single player-originated action. (c) forces matching edits across 5 tsc/test-enforced surfaces: GameAction union + dispatch case, the exhaustive KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES Record (also the parseNetMessage gate), the CLIENT_INTENT_TYPES allowlist, BENCH_INTENT_POLICY (a test asserts set-equality with the allowlist -> a new intent FORCES an allow/deny decision), and the PROTOCOL_VERSION literal-type tripwire on HelloMsg.protoVersion. Bump the version for a new gameplay intent so cross-version matches hard-reject at HELLO instead of silently desyncing.

P1 #freeze-a-sim-loop-without-starving-the-network-or-the-clock: an early `continue` that pauses the whole fixed-step loop ALSO skips the snapshot-send at the loop bottom -> 1v1 clients stall on their last frame. Fix: inside the freeze branch, (1) still advance world.tick so timeout/resume windows elapse, (2) run the event's own per-tick driver, and (3) REPLICATE the host snapshot-send (same cadence guard) before continuing. Also: a whole minigame can cost only ~+4KiB of CORE bundle if the heavy Pixi VIEW is a lazy dynamic-import (mirror the codex/bot/debug overlay pattern) while the generator+event logic stays core (reducer+snapshot need it synchronously). Landed +2.7KiB over the 550 charter -> flag the residual, don't hide it.
session_status: S93 NONET shipped + pushed (31a8aa6 -> deploy.yml building spark-online.space). 9-square Sudoku-lock, ALL modes: trigger+freeze+overlay+solve+resolve, 1v1 netcode (snapshot sudoku field seed-only + SUDOKU_SOLVED intent + PROTOCOL_VERSION 9), realm-shift audio (Cloudstep Caravan). tsc 0, vitest 1463/1463, build OK, bundle 552.7 KiB (+2.7 over 550 charter -> trim/review). Preview-verified overlay in 3 states, zero console errors. USER WILL PLAYTEST on spark-online.space + report bugs. CARRY: anime-SFX layer; combo order-symmetry bug (Triangle->Spiral magic vs reverse placeholder line, systemic, own PDR); bundle trim; resolve juice (shake/flood); =9 vs >=9 trigger tuning.
